_note: Anchored at tp=4 on the reserved 4x A100-80GB ramr node (70B bf16 ~140GB fits with ~37GB/GPU KV room). Single-TP: no tp_pair because 70B at tp=2 is KV-starved on 80GB (init failure) and tp=8 needs the contended owners pool. The e_comm/NVLink term is deferred to a later owners 8-GPU run (tp=8 vs tp=4).
